examples: Warning: Don't lift the clipper with the cord avoiding it enwind.
There were at least four kinds of mechanisms in the formation process of aerobic granular sludge, i. e. enwind, unite, Absorb and connect.
The ultrastructural and cytochemical analysis showed that NF9 and TC3 could enwind and infect the Phytophthora hyphae especially in the hypha within the medium.
